title: ceratozamia totonacorum
intro: Ceratozamia totonacorum, also known as the Totonac palmate cycad, is a species of cycad that belongs to the family Zamiaceae. It is a native plant to Mexico and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The leaves of Ceratozamia totonacorum are typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting wound healing.
